headline: Is First Solar (FSLR) One of the Best Solar Energy Stocks to Buy Right Now?
summary: First Solar Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR) is one of the best solar energy stocks to buy right now. On April 30, First Solar reported a strong start to 2026 with Q1 net sales of $1.04 billion, a 24% increase compared to the prior year. This growth was fueled by record sales in India and higher module volumes […]
